svg.title: Signal Finder + CodeTape — accessible field schematic
svg.desc: Five numbered zones: Zone 1 Signal Finder (top, circle badge, solid border), Zone 2 CodeTape (left, square badge, double border), Zone 3 Local Steward (right, diamond badge, thick border), Zone 4 Paper Tags (lower left, tag badge, rounded border), Zone 5 Responders and Mutual Aid (bottom, pentagon badge, dashed border). Drones noted as optional later layer. Three arrow styles encode flow type. All zones readable without color via shape, number, and border pattern.
svg.text: Community emergency signal system · commons field schematic · v0.1 (accessible)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Signal Finder')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Local Steward')
g.text: Data belongs here — not the cloud

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Paper Tags')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Responders and Mutual Aid')
g.text: Use signals to help — not to extract

svg.text: ① Scanner ② Memory ③ Steward ④ Paper tags ⑤ Responders
v0 prototype: no drones. Start with zones 4 → 3 → 5.
Write a tag → hand it to a steward → steward tells responders.
That loop works without power, cloud, or hardware.
[ optional later layer ] Drone-assisted Signal Finder — adds aerial range.
Add only when community consent and local oversight are in place.
No surveillance · no extractive capture · consent-first · data stays local · human dignity always
Read it → critique one thing → adapt it → test one tiny piece → share what you learn
